items.final_wording: Supports sudden onset, neurological deficit, fever, trauma, pattern change, unexplained vomiting, further investigation or referral, and structured headache-diary fields.

source.title: Headaches in over 12s: diagnosis and management
source.population: People aged 12 years and over with headache disorders, including migraine.
source.setting: Primary and specialist assessment and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for headache and migraine assessment in people aged 12 years and over; partial for adult-only DHA comparison and not directly validated for UAE pathways outside the DHA source.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.4 — assessment, red flags, and headache diary

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports sudden onset, neurological deficit, fever, trauma, pattern change, unexplained vomiting, further investigation or referral, and structured headache-diary fields.

items.rationale: Supports headache assessment, red flags and diary fields for tension-type headache; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.

source.title: Headaches in over 12s: diagnosis and management
source.population: People aged 12 years and over with headache disorders, including migraine.
source.setting: Primary and specialist assessment and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for headache and migraine assessment in people aged 12 years and over; partial for adult-only DHA comparison and not directly validated for UAE pathways outside the DHA source.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-entered headache features and differentiation context for tension-type headache; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports recording headache frequency, duration, severity, intervention effectiveness, impact, and clinician-led further investigation or referral when red flags develop.
